source_paper.title: Target-Mediated Drug Disposition Population Pharmacokinetics Model of Alirocumab in Healthy Volunteers and Patients: Pooled Analysis of Randomized Phase I/II/III Studies

mathematical_equations: QSS assumption: Kss = (Koff + Kint)/Kon, R = Ksyn/(Kdeg + Kon*C)
Vc = TVVC * COV1^DISST (DISST=0 healthy, 1 patient; initial model n=527)
CLL = TVCLL * COV1^STATIN (STATIN=1 with statin, 0 without; expanded model n=2870)
Pi = TVP * (WT/WTmed)^EXP for CLL (EXP=0.75), Q (EXP=0.75), Vc (EXP=1)
